title: Craftable Elytra Recipe
description: You can Craft Elytra now and spread your wings in the air!!!
body:
# Craftable Elytra Recepie

**Take Flight on Your Terms**

Tired of raiding End Cities just to find one lonely pair of Elytra? Same. This datapack puts the wings in your hands — no End busting, no Shulker spam, just pure sky-bound freedom.

Note: “Elytra Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack. If you are interested in more Datapacks check out the linkq at the end of the description.


**🧠 Why It’s Better**:
Because exploration shouldn’t be gated behind RNG and grind. Whether you're building sky bases, dodging creepers in style, or just want to feel like a superhero, this pack lets you soar without the slog.

**📦 How to Use:**

1.  Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your wings and take off

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Try out some more datapacks if you wish:**
